queue.title: New Game: Reaction Time Trainer
queue.description: Click-when-green reaction trainer with stats (avg, best, worst over 5 attempts), letter grade (S < 150ms, A < 200ms, B < 250ms, C < 300ms), share button. Gamers love knowing their reaction time.

queue.title: New Game: FPS Aim Trainer
queue.description: Canvas-based target clicking game — random targets appear, click before they disappear. Track accuracy %, targets hit, misses. 30-second rounds. Share best score.

queue.title: Versus: SteelSeries Arctis Nova 7 vs HyperX Cloud Alpha Wireless
queue.description: Mid-tier wireless headset comparison — both under $150. Arctis Nova 7 (multi-platform, 360° spatial) vs Cloud Alpha Wireless (6-month battery, dual chamber). Strong search volume.

queue.title: Versus: Logitech G403 vs Razer DeathAdder V3
queue.description: Mid-tier wired mouse comparison. Classic ergonomic shape battle.
